rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DALE BOND VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Augment Its Expert Designation And To Have Its Offer Of Expert Dr. Allan Feingold Deemed Timely
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 29, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT HILL BROTHERS CHEMICAL COMPANY'S Motion To Augment Its Expert Designation And To Have Its Offer Of Expert Dr. Allan Feingold Deemed Timely IS OFF CALENDAR, MATTER TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 610. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL A DAVIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 29, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO NEGLIGENCE AND STRICT LIABILITY CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. COURT SUSTAINS PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO THE TESTIMONY OF COHEN AND CASTLEMAN AS HEARSAY THAT DOES NOT MEET THE FORMER TESTIMONY EXCEPTION. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION WHICH IS CONCEDED. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DEFENDANT SHIFTS THE BURDEN BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORY RESPONSES. COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANT'S OJBECTIONS TO EXHIBITS C, D, E AND F. EXHIBITS NOT PROPERLY AUTHENTICATED, DECLARANT LACKS FOUNDATION, AND HEARSAY. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN BALDWIN et al VS. PHILIP A RICHARDSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion By Cross-Deft Mori Hatsushi & Associates To Strike Cross-Complaint Filed By Buena Vista Construction,Inc. Or In The Alternative, To Order A Separate Trail Of Buena Vista Construction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 29, 2009, line 3, CROSS-DEFENDANT MORI HATSUSHI & ASSOCIATES Amended Motion By Cross-Defendant Mori Hatsushi & Associates To Strike Cross-Complaint Filed By Buena Vista Construction, Inc. Or In The Alternative, To Order A Separate Trial Of Buena Vista Construction IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 1, 2009 TO BE HEARD WITH OTHER MOTION TO STRIKE. THE COURT WILL HEAR THE MOTIONS TO STRIKE AFTER THE PRESIDING JUDGE RULES ON THE SEPTEMBER 30 MOTIONS TO CONTINUE TRIAL. IN ADDITION, THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER SHIHEIBER et al VS. JAMILEH BAJJALIEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 29, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS JAMILEH BAJJALIEH AND ANTON BAJJALIEH'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PARAGRAPHS 42, 43, AND 44, AND PRAYER FOR GENERAL DAMAGES. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER SHIHEIBER et al VS. JAMILEH BAJJALIEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 29, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS JAMILEH BAJJALIEH AND ANTON BAJJALIEH'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFFS TO PLEAD FACTS THAT SUPPORT A SPECIAL RELATIONSHIP AND DUTY REGARDING DEFENDANT JAMILEH. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THIRD CAUSE ACTION, NO LOSS OF CONSORTIUM FOR THE CHILDREN OF DECEDENT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA A VS. SUPERIOR AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER CO A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 29, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANT SUPERIOR AUTOMATIC SPRINKLEY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF TO SPECIFICALLY ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANT HAD ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE KNOWLEDGE OF PLAINTIFF'S INTENT TO FILE A SUBROGATION CLAIM AT THE TIME THE SETTLEMENT AND RELEASE WERE SIGNED. OBJECTIONS TO JUDICIAL NOTICE OVERRULED. =(302/CWW)
